history: === Game start. Pilot A on the play. ===
Pilot A: opening hand drawn (7 cards)
Pilot B: opening hand drawn (7 cards)
Pilot A plays Arid Mesa
Pilot A: cracked Mesa for Sacred Foundry, took 3 dmg (now 17 life)
Pilot B draws for turn (now 8 cards)
[JUDGE] Pilot B claimed Marsh→SV but Marsh fetches Plains/Swamp; SV illegal.
[JUDGE] Closest legal alt = Hallowed Fountain (W/U via Plains subtype). Both agents agree to apply that.
Pilot B plays Marsh Flats
Pilot B: cracked Marsh Flats for Hallowed Fountain, took 3 dmg (now 17 life)
Pilot A draws for turn (now 7 cards)
Pilot A plays Mountain
Pilot A passes turn (no other plays available — no creatures to remove, no spells on stack to counter, Phlage needs 1 more land)
Pilot B draws for turn (now 8 cards)
Pilot B plays Hallowed Fountain
Pilot B: Hallowed Fountain ETB untapped, took 2 dmg (now 15 life)
Pilot B holds priority — no spell castable this turn (can't pay 2 mana yet without untapping first)
Pilot A draws for turn (now 7 cards)
Pilot A plays Field of Ruin
Pilot A casts Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury → ETB: 3 to opp, gain 3 life. Sacs to yard.
Phlage ETB: opp 12, Pilot A 20 life. Phlage to yard.
Pilot B draws for turn (now 8 cards)
Pilot B: casts White Orchid Phantom WW from 2 Hallowed Fountains
Pilot B casts White Orchid Phantom, enters battlefield
Pilot B destroys Pilot A's Sacred Foundry
Pilot A searches library for basic, puts Island into play tapped
Pilot A loses SF, finds a basic from library, plays it tapped
